entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "खूप समजावून सांगण्यापूर्वी मला प्रश्न विचारा."

entries.source: "Athens, 399 BCE"
"Chang'an, 742"
"Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "तुमचे उत्तर देण्यापूर्वी माझे उत्तर तपासा."

entries.source: "Delhi, 1857"
"Florence, 1504"
"Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "मी प्रयत्न केल्यानंतर मला अधिक कठीण version द्या."

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "हे beginner friendly ठेवा."

entries.source: "London, 1666"
"Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "माझ्या exam, project किंवा daily life मधील उदाहरणे वापरा."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI prompt सूचना

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: अगदी छोटी पहिली task मागा.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: तुम्ही स्वतः लिहिलेल्या recap ने end करा.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: या mode साठी job सोपा आहे: temporal passport build करा, travel advisory clear करा आणि scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory आणि evidence द्वारे historical world explore करा.

entries.source: For Time travel, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Time travel साठी useful practice loop असा आहे:

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: good prompts मध्ये साधारणपणे तीन गोष्टी असतात: subject, तुमचा current level आणि तुम्हाला हवी असलेली help. perfect wording गरजेचे नाही. session सुरू होण्यासाठी पुरेसा context हवा.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: response खूप broad वाटल्यास narrow करा. one example, one misconception, one check question किंवा one next step मागा. खूप easy वाटल्यास challenge मागा. खूप hard वाटल्यास तुम्हाला आधीच माहित असलेल्या गोष्टीतून bridge मागा.

entries.source: Immersion
entries.value: इमर्शन

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: output अधिक useful करा

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Time travel on inspir.
entries.value: inspir वर Time travel मधून useful learning results मिळवण्यासाठी prompt ideas आणि repeatable study loop.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: AI response वाचणे म्हणजे learning नाही. पहिल्या answer नंतर, mode ला idea वरून तुम्हाला काहीतरी करायला लावा असे सांगा.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: related शिकणे paths

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: uncertain वाटलेल्या part वर feedback request करा.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: solution मागण्यापूर्वी respond करा.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: one clear request ने सुरू करा

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: goal एका sentence मध्ये state करा.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: अभ्यास कौशल्ये

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: तो final recap महत्त्वाचा आहे. तुम्ही idea परत explain करता तेव्हा काय solid आहे आणि काय अजून AI कडून borrowed आहे ते reveal होते.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable असतात. journey state आणि evidence मध्ये anchored राहते: काय known आहे, काय reconstructed आहे, काय speculative आहे आणि तुमची identity realistically कशापर्यंत access करू शकते.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Time travel is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Time travel मधून सर्वात लवकर उपयोग मिळवण्याचा मार्ग म्हणजे AI ला केवळ विषय न देता शिकण्याचे काम देणे. विषय तुम्हाला कशात रस आहे ते सांगतो. शिकण्याचे काम तुम्हाला कोणत्या प्रकारची मदत हवी आहे ते सांगते.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: मग session अधिक personal करणारी constraint जोडा:

entries.source: Time travel prompts and study loop
entries.value: Time travel prompts आणि study loop

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: या starters पैकी एक try करा:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: mode ला practice मध्ये बदला

entries.source: Use Time travel when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Quiz me on Trivia. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Time travel हे या कामासाठी योग्य mode असताना ते वापरा. Related path हवा असल्यास Quiz me on Trivia try करा. Study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay आणि active recall साठी AI learning blog देखील browse करू शकता.
